name: Motorcross Simulator
short_description: "Motorcross Simulator" is a third-person mountain motorcycle simulator.
detailed_description: This game simulates the real experience of off-road motorcycle riding. Freely ride your motorcycle through the mountains and fully experience the thrill and challenge of off-road driving.Players will navigate through mountainous terrain without paved roads, facing obstacles like rocks and trees. Colliding with obstacles or falling from a height will cause the rider to fall off the bike. The motorcycle is equipped with a realistic physics system, allowing it to automatically roll down slopes, greatly enhancing the challenge and excitement of off-road riding.
